source: RIC-3, Information on the Amateur Radio Service, Issue 5, March 2022

major_topics.title: Regulations and Policies
major_topics.summary: Licensing, certificates, station identification, operating limits, interference, international operation, RF exposure, and land-use rules.

major_topics.title: Operating and Procedures
major_topics.summary: Voice, CW, repeater, simplex, emergency, logging, signal reports, Q signals, and courteous operating procedures.

major_topics.title: Station Assembly, Practice and Safety
major_topics.summary: Station blocks, transmitters, receivers, power supplies, digital systems, batteries, antennas, electrical safety, and RF safety.

major_topics.title: Circuit Components
major_topics.summary: Amplifiers, diodes, bipolar transistors, field-effect transistors, vacuum tubes, and resistor colour codes.

major_topics.title: Basic Electronics and Theory
major_topics.summary: Metric prefixes, current, voltage, resistance, power, Ohm's law, AC, decibels, capacitance, inductance, resonance, and measurement.

major_topics.title: Feedlines and Antenna Systems
major_topics.summary: Feedline impedance, coax, balanced lines, baluns, line loss, SWR, matching, polarization, wavelength, gain, verticals, Yagis, wires, and loops.

major_topics.title: Radio Wave Propagation
major_topics.summary: Line-of-sight, ground wave, sky wave, ionosphere, skip, solar activity, MF/HF/VHF/UHF propagation, aurora, ducting, and scatter.

major_topics.title: Interference and Suppression
major_topics.summary: Front-end overload, cross-modulation, audio rectification, ferrites, intermodulation, spurious emissions, key clicks, harmonics, splatter, and filters.
